title: SKILL.md frontmatter (AIP-3)
description: Validates the YAML frontmatter portion of an AIP-3 SKILL.md manifest. Note: this very schema is also exercised by the AIP-3 authoring SKILL.md in the same folder — the authoring skill is itself a valid AIP-3 skill and validates against this file.

schema.description: Schema dispatch tag. MUST be 'skills/v1' for this version of AIP-3.

name.description: Machine identifier. Lowercase, digits, dashes. Must start with a letter, end with a letter or digit.

description.description: One-paragraph purpose, written for the LLM caller. Used by the host catalog for skill selection.

version.description: Semver. Bump on breaking change to inputs or required tools.

entry.description: Optional. Relative path to an entry file (e.g. skill.ts) exposing defineSkill. Body-only skills omit this.

tags.description: Catalog tags. Lowercase kebab-case; no leading symbols. 3-6 tags is typical.

type.description: Input type. Richer shapes go in the body as guidance.

description.description: Prose for the LLM. Empty descriptions train the agent to hallucinate.

default.description: Optional default value when 'required' is false.

outputs.description: Optional. JSON Schema (draft 2020-12) describing the structured output the skill reports back, if any. Most skills return prose only and omit this field.

tools.description: Tool ids the skill expects to find in the host's catalog. Declarative — the body still drives invocation.

skills.description: Other skills this skill composes with. The host MAY refuse activation if any are absent.

capabilities.description: Host capabilities the skill needs. Gated by AIP-7 before activation.

examples.description: Optional sample invocations. The host MAY use these as registration-time tests.

scope.description: Default install scope hint. Hosts MAY override based on policy.

path.description: Optional custom install path; defaults to '<scope-root>/.skills/<name>/'.

metadata.description: Host-specific extension fields. Authors stash hints under namespaced keys (e.g. metadata.acme.foo).

then.description: If 'entry' is declared, it MUST be non-empty. The host loads it and expects a defineSkill default export.
